powpow/proto/multithread.nim — Multi-threaded HTTP server.

Each worker thread creates its own event loop + HTTP server + TCP server with a SO_REUSEPORT listen socket bound to the same address:port. The kernel distributes incoming connections across the workers. No single-threaded acceptor bottleneck, no cross-thread communication.

Usage:

  let server = newMultiThreadHttpServer()
  server.start do (req: HttpRequest, res: HttpResponse):
    if req.getPath() == "/":
      res.status(Http200).send("Hello!")
  , "0.0.0.0", 9000

Imports

../loop, ../types, ../net/tcp, ../net/common, httpserver

Types

MultiThreadHttpServer = ref object
  numThreads*: int

Procs

    ...raises: [OSError, NetError, ResourceExhaustedError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newMultiThreadHttpServer(numThreads: int = 0): MultiThreadHttpServer {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc start(srv: MultiThreadHttpServer; cb: OnRequestCallback; address: string;
           port: int) {....raises: [OSError, NetError, ResourceExhaustedError],
                        tags: [], forbids: [].}
